pokemon:clodsire.name: Clodsire
pokemon:clodsire.summary: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.
It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.

form:clodsire.name: Clodsire
form:clodsire.summary: Clodsire form with Poison / Ground typing.
